autoReply.fallback: Hello! I received your message. We'll be in touch soon. 😊
autoReply.fallbackSms: Hello! I received your message. We'll be in touch soon.
autoReply.handover: Of course! I'll let the team know and a person will reach out to you here shortly. 🙏
autoReply.handoverSms: Of course! I'll let the team know and a person will reach out to you here shortly.
autoReply.greeting: Hello! Thanks for your message. 😊 How can I help you today?
autoReply.audioFail: Sorry, I couldn't process the audio. Could you type your message instead? 😊

hint.active: Clara replies automatically in this conversation.
hint.paused: The AI stays silent until you hand the conversation back.
hint.withTeam: A team member replied less than 24h ago. The AI resumes on its own after 24h of silence, or now via hand-back.

handoff.manualHint: Sending a manual reply keeps Clara silent in this conversation for 24h.

page.title: WhatsApp Bot
page.subtitle: Conversation monitor and AI assistant
page.twilioConfigDesc: Set the webhook below in the Twilio Console → WhatsApp Sandbox or purchased number:
page.serviceErrorDesc: Check that the SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY environment variables are configured in Vercel.
page.emptyHint: Set up the webhook in Twilio and send a test message.
